description: Individual products associated with a specific purchase order. See PurchaseOrderHeader.

columns.name: purchaseorderid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to PurchaseOrderHeader.PurchaseOrderID.

columns.name: purchaseorderdetailid
columns.description: Primary key. One line number per purchased product.

columns.name: duedate
columns.description: Date the product is expected to be received.

columns.name: orderqty
columns.description: Quantity ordered.

columns.name: productid
columns.description: Product identification number. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.

columns.name: receivedqty
columns.description: Quantity actually received from the vendor.

columns.name: rejectedqty
columns.description: Quantity rejected during inspection.

description: General purchase order information. See PurchaseOrderDetail.

columns.name: purchaseorderid
columns.description: Primary key.

columns.name: revisionnumber
columns.description: Incremental number to track changes to the purchase order over time.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Order current status. 1 = Pending; 2 = Approved; 3 = Rejected; 4 = Complete

columns.name: employeeid
columns.description: Employee who created the purchase order. Foreign key to Employee.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: vendorid
columns.description: Vendor with whom the purchase order is placed. Foreign key to Vendor.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: shipmethodid
columns.description: Shipping method. Foreign key to ShipMethod.ShipMethodID.

columns.name: orderdate
columns.description: Purchase order creation date.

columns.name: shipdate
columns.description: Estimated shipment date from the vendor.

columns.name: subtotal
columns.description: Purchase order subtotal. Computed as SUM(PurchaseOrderDetail.LineTotal)for the appropriate PurchaseOrderID.

columns.name: taxamt
columns.description: Tax amount.

columns.name: freight
columns.description: Shipping cost.

description: Cross-reference table mapping vendors with the products they supply.

columns.name: productid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to Vendor.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: averageleadtime
columns.description: The average span of time (in days) between placing an order with the vendor and receiving the purchased product.

columns.name: lastreceiptcost
columns.description: The selling price when last purchased.

columns.name: lastreceiptdate
columns.description: Date the product was last received by the vendor.

columns.name: minorderqty
columns.description: The maximum quantity that should be ordered.

columns.name: maxorderqty
columns.description: The minimum quantity that should be ordered.

columns.name: onorderqty
columns.description: The quantity currently on order.

columns.name: shipmethodid
columns.description: Primary key for ShipMethod records.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Shipping company name.

columns.name: shipbase
columns.description: Minimum shipping charge.

columns.name: shiprate
columns.description: Shipping charge per pound.

description: Companies from whom Adventure Works Cycles purchases parts or other goods.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key for Vendor records.  Foreign key to BusinessEntity.BusinessEntityID

columns.name: accountnumber
columns.description: Vendor account (identification) number.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Company name.

columns.name: creditrating
columns.description: 1 = Superior, 2 = Excellent, 3 = Above average, 4 = Average, 5 = Below average

columns.name: preferredvendorstatus
columns.description: 0 = Do not use if another vendor is available. 1 = Preferred over other vendors supplying the same product.

columns.name: activeflag
columns.description: 0 = Vendor no longer used. 1 = Vendor is actively used.

columns.name: purchasingwebserviceurl
columns.description: Vendor URL.
